name: logistics carriers processing 10–20 loads/week tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 10–20 loads/week, inefficient load optimization causes increased operational costs. We automate dispatch instead of manual load planning and dispatching.
problem_solved: Inefficient load optimization leading to increased operational costs.
